scripts.textures:pack: TexturePacker assets/textures --sheet public/assets/textures.png --data assets/textures-config.json --format json-array --extrude 0 --algorithm Basic --texture-format png --padding 1 --border-padding 1 --trim-mode None --png-opt-level 0 --disable-auto-alias --trim-sprite-names
scripts.textures:pack:watch: nodemon --watch assets/textures --ext png --exec npm run textures:pack
